topics.title: Income Tax Self-Assessment
topics.summary: Online SA return deadline is 31 January following the tax year end (5 April). Paper returns due 31 October. Late filing penalty £100 plus daily charges after 3 months.

topics.title: PAYE + National Insurance
topics.summary: Employers report payroll to HMRC via RTI on or before each payday. Primary Class 1 NIC rate 8% between PT and UEL, 2% above. Employer secondary 13.8%.

topics.title: Corporation Tax
topics.summary: Main rate 25% (profits >£250k). Small profits rate 19% (≤£50k) with marginal relief in between. CT return due 12 months after accounting period end; tax due 9 months + 1 day.

topics.title: VAT
topics.summary: Standard rate 20%, reduced 5%, zero 0%. Registration threshold £90,000 (from Apr 2024). Returns quarterly via Making Tax Digital.

topics.title: Making Tax Digital for ITSA
topics.summary: From April 2026 self-employed and landlords with income >£50k must keep digital records and file quarterly updates to HMRC.
